'''Vessitoar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Vessitoar system/Legends|Vessitoar system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] with a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Vessitoar training facilities|military training facility]].
